description: Create a custom visual reading tracker in TiddlyWiki by implementing a global macro and a dynamic dashboard. Define a macro named `reading-progress` within a tiddler titled `ProgressMacro` (tagged `$:/tags/Macro`) that accepts `current` and `total` parameters to render an HTML5 `<progress>` element. Additionally, create a `Reading Dashboard` tiddler that dynamically lists all tiddlers tagged `Book`. For each entry, display the book's title as a clickable link, the text "by" followed by the `author` field, and an invocation of the `reading-progress` macro using the `pages_read` and `total_pages` fields. All values must be retrieved dynamically from the tiddler fields.
